name: project-planning
description: Generate initial project planning documents (PVS, ADR, Tech Spec, Roadmap) from a project concept description. Use when starting a new project, when docs/planning/ contains placeholder files, or when user requests project planning document generation.
capabilities: Generate Project Vision and Scope document with problem statement and success metrics
Create Architecture Decision Records for key technical choices
Write Technical Implementation Specification with tech stack and data model
Build Development Roadmap with phased implementation plan
Validate documents for completeness and cross-references
Synthesize all documents into actionable PROJECT-PLAN.md
author: ByronWilliamsCPA
securitySummary: All 214 static findings are FALSE POSITIVES. The analyzer misinterprets markdown backtick syntax as Ruby/shell command execution, documentation references to algorithms as cryptographic usage, and file path patterns as path traversal. This is a pure documentation skill containing only markdown files and one benign Python validation script that reads files without network calls, file writes, or command execution.
valueStatement: Starting a new project without clear planning leads to architectural drift and context loss. This skill generates four essential documents (PVS, ADR, Tech Spec, Roadmap) that guide AI-assisted development and maintain coherence across coding sessions.
limitations: Requires user to provide initial project description and constraints
Does not execute code or modify project files directly
Does not integrate with external project management tools

useCases.title: Start new AI-assisted projects
useCases.description: Generate comprehensive planning documents before writing any code to ensure AI tools have clear architectural context.

useCases.title: Document architectural decisions
useCases.description: Create ADRs that capture key technical choices with rationale, alternatives considered, and consequences.

useCases.title: Plan phased implementation
useCases.description: Build detailed roadmaps with user stories, success criteria, and clear phase dependencies.

promptTemplates.title: New project
promptTemplates.scenario: Generate planning for a new project
promptTemplates.prompt: I want to build a [project type] for [target users] that solves [problem]. Use the /plan skill to generate project planning documents with the following constraints: [list constraints].

promptTemplates.title: Document review
promptTemplates.prompt: Review the planning documents in docs/planning/ against the current codebase. Check for consistency between what was planned and what was implemented. Flag any discrepancies.

promptTemplates.title: Update roadmap
promptTemplates.prompt: I completed [task] from Phase [N]. Update docs/planning/roadmap.md to mark tasks as complete, update milestone progress, and add the next tasks to the TODO list.

promptTemplates.title: ADR creation
promptTemplates.prompt: I need to make a technical decision about [component/feature]. Create an ADR in docs/planning/adr/adr-[NNN]-[topic].md that documents the context, options considered, decision made, and consequences.

bestPractices: Generate planning documents before writing any code to establish architectural context for AI assistants
Review and validate each document using the consensus tool before proceeding to the next document
Update documents as the project evolves to prevent drift between planned and actual implementation
antiPatterns: Skipping planning and asking AI to generate code without architectural context
Using generated documents without reviewing them for project-specific accuracy
Failing to update documents when implementation differs from the original plan

faq.question: Does this skill modify my project files?
faq.answer: No. This skill generates planning documents in docs/planning/ but requires user confirmation before writing files.

faq.question: Can I use this with existing projects?
faq.answer: Yes. Provide your project description and the skill will generate appropriate documents based on your context.

faq.question: What tools does this skill require?
faq.answer: The skill works standalone. Optionally uses mcp__zen__consensus for expert review of generated documents.

faq.question: How many documents are generated?
faq.answer: Four documents: Project Vision and Scope, Technical Spec, Roadmap, and at least one ADR.

faq.question: Is my project data safe?
faq.answer: Yes. All processing happens locally. Documents are generated from your input without external data transmission.

faq.question: How is this different from other planning tools?
faq.answer: This skill specifically targets AI-assisted development with templates designed to provide context coherence across Claude Code sessions.
